case_title: RACHAEL BUBECK VS. RICHARD LLOYD HAZARD

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-19-2008 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PARTIES TO APR-24-2008 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. CERTIFIED MAIL GREEN CARD NOT RETURNED BY THE POST OFFICE. DEFENDANT RICHARD HAZARD INDICATES HE RECEIVED PLAINITIFF'S CLAIM ON MARCH 17, 2008. DEFENDANT RICHARD HAZARD DOES NOT WAIVE SERVICE. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF BUBECK, RACHAEL
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY BUBECK, RACHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT HAZARD, RICHARD LLOYD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-19-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BUBECK, RACHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT HAZARD, RICHARD LLOYD
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF BUBECK, RACHAEL
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF BUBECK, RACHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT HAZARD, RICHARD LLOYD CLAIM HEARING OF APR-24-2008 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
